title: Brand and tone
summary: Keep AI-generated communication aligned with trust, clarity, and voice.
decision: How the system speaks to users when generating or rewriting text.

intent.purpose: Ensure AI-generated content feels consistent with how the company communicates while still adapting to context and user needs.
intent.failure_mode: Content becomes manipulative, overly confident, or inconsistent across surfaces, eroding trust and increasing support burden.
intent.good_judgment: Clear, direct language that matches the situation. Confident when evidence is strong. Careful when uncertainty exists. Never coercive.
acceptable_variation: shorten or expand copy for surface constraints
shift tone slightly between support, product, and UI generation contexts

detection.decision_question: Is this output speaking to the user in a way that aligns with how we want to treat them?

low.description: Rewrite the text and log the event.

medium.description: Rewrite, log, and route to review.

high.description: Block the output and escalate to the owner.
